---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear, concise description of what went wrong.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | e.g. macOS 14.4, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Node.js version | run `node --version` |
| LLM provider | Gemini / Ollama |
| Gemini model | e.g. `gemini-2.5-flash` (if using Gemini) |
| Ollama model | e.g. `gemma3:12b` (if using Ollama) |
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 126 |

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. If there is an error message, paste it here (from the browser console **and** the terminal running `npm run dev`).

```
paste error output here
```

## Additional context

Any other context — screenshots, the job description you used (if relevant and not sensitive), network tab output, etc.
